nasb.text: And a woman who had been suffering from a hemorrhage for twelve years, came up behind Him and touched the fringe of His cloak;

esv.text: And behold, a woman who had suffered from a discharge of blood for twelve years came up behind him and touched the fringe of his garment,

cnv.text: 有一個女人，患了十二年的血漏病，她走到耶穌背後，摸他衣服的繸子，

ccb.text: 途中，有一个患了十二年血漏病的女人挤到耶稣的背后，摸了一下祂衣服的穗边，

csbs.text: 这时候，忽然有一个患血漏十二年的女人，从耶稣后面过来，摸了一下耶稣的衣服穗子，
